meaning: adj.浣块夯鏈ㄧ殑,浣垮け鍘绘劅瑙夌殑
examples: It was another day of mind-numbing tedium.

My eye throbbed with a dull, numbing pain.

Most would probably describe it as useless web surfing and brain numbing tv watching.
